packs.name: Kubernetes Baseline
packs.description: Guards against destructive kubectl and Helm operations: namespace deletion, prod-context changes, node disruption, and secret removal.

packs.name: Docker Baseline
packs.description: Prevents high-risk Docker operations: privileged container runs, host filesystem mounts, system pruning, and unapproved image pushes.

packs.name: AWS Baseline
packs.description: Protects critical AWS infrastructure: prevents S3 bucket deletion, IAM destructive changes, KMS key scheduling, CloudTrail tampering, and unilateral compute/database termination.

packs.name: Git Baseline
packs.description: Protects protected branches from force-pushes and unreviewed direct pushes. Prevents accidental hard resets, dangerous untracked-file removal, and credential exposure in commits.

packs.name: Secrets Baseline
packs.description: Comprehensive secret and credential hygiene: blocks secrets from entering prompts and tool calls, redacts secrets in tool output, and prevents reading well-known credential files.

packs.name: Database Baseline
packs.description: Prevents irreversible database operations: schema drops, privilege escalation, truncation, unqualified deletes, and direct prod database access.

packs.name: Terraform Baseline
packs.description: Guards infrastructure-as-code operations: blocks unreviewed apply and destroy, prevents state file corruption, and gates all applies behind admin access.

packs.name: Filesystem Baseline
packs.description: Protects the host filesystem: blocks recursive root deletion, piping remote scripts to shell, block-device overwrites, and access to system credential files.
